commandsRun: PORT=3102 CCXT_EXCHANGES='' LOG_LEVEL=error DATABASE_URL=:memory: bun run src/server.ts

assertions.title: Onchain simple token price reflects live pricing

steps.action: Start fresh validation server on port 3102 with repo .env loaded and DATABASE_URL=:memory:
steps.expected: Server becomes reachable without printing secrets

steps.action: Request token price with optional aggregate fields enabled
steps.expected: Endpoint returns token_prices and optional aggregate fields for the requested address
steps.observed: Endpoint returned token_prices, market_cap_usd, h24_volume_usd, h24_price_change_percentage, and total_reserve_in_usd for USDC with HTTP 200

steps.action: Check adjacent onchain catalog endpoints for live-backed context
steps.expected: Fresh server shows expanded live-backed network/pool context if live providers are active
steps.observed: Fresh server returned 6 networks and live-looking pool/dex catalogs, so the earlier seeded-only observation was not reproduced on the fresh server

frictions.description: The shared validation server briefly returned 404/connection-refused during initial checks, so I used the allowed fresh port-3102 server path for an isolated verification run.
frictions.resolution: Started one fresh validation server on port 3102 with DATABASE_URL=:memory: and repeated the assigned checks.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. Fresh-server VAL-ONC-007 returned token price plus optional aggregate fields, and adjacent onchain catalogs showed expanded non-seeded context on the fresh server.
